name: Supply Chain Compromise via Unsigned Software Update
description: Detects execution of unsigned binaries from software update directories
query:
// Detect unsigned executables launched from update/installer paths
// Trigger on unsigned binaries in update directories
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)(update|installer|setup|patch)"
  and signature_status = "unsigned"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 1
within 300 seconds
